architectural_patterns: SQLite-backed Autonomous Scheduler with Task Persistence
Consolidated Cognitive Engine for Repo Mapping
Bounded Semantic Linker to prevent memory explosion
Safety Guards for Autonomous Execution (whitelist, shell=False)
lessons_learned: Circular imports are a risk when refactoring large modules; use local imports in legacy bridges.
Atomic writes are essential for persistent daemons to prevent corruption during crashes.
Hard safety limits (whitelist) are required for autonomous systems to prevent arbitrary execution.
